# Hex2077 AI Hub Today (何夕2077的AI资讯)

> Focus on curated daily AI news, weekly insights, and practical AI tool tutorials.

AI Hub Today is a high-quality information hub for developers, researchers, and AI enthusiasts. It provides structured, precise content ideal for Large Language Models (LLMs) to ingest and process.

## 📌 Main Content
- [Daily AI News](https://ai.hubtoday.app/): Selected daily news and big model updates.
- [AI Weekly](https://ai.hubtoday.app/blog/weekly/): In-depth weekly summaries and industry trends.
- [AI Blog](https://ai.hubtoday.app/blog/): Practical tutorials and technical insights.

## 🏷️ AI Knowledge Index (Keywords)
Extracted core AI terms and long-tail keywords for better topical understanding:
- [AI Keywords (Chinese)](https://ai.hubtoday.app/tags/ai_tags/): 站内 AI 核心关键词汇总。
- [AI Keywords (English)](https://ai.hubtoday.app/en/tags/ai_tags/): Curated list of core AI terms from site content.

## 🛠️ Resources
- [About Us](https://ai.hubtoday.app/about/): Mission, vision, and content philosophy.
- [Sitemap](https://ai.hubtoday.app/sitemap.xml): Full list of crawlable pages.
- [Contact](https://ai.hubtoday.app/contact/): Reach out to our team.
- [Source Code](https://github.com/justlovemaki/CloudFlare-AI-Insight-Daily): Project repository.
